title: Know when a group is deleted
excerpt: I need to know when a group is deleted but there’s no event to flag in the webhook to indicated it. Additionally, when looking in the documentation, we can pass the field deleted on query for groups, but it doesn’t retur…

posts.author: elisa.bea (Elisa)
posts.cookedHtml:
I need to know when a group is deleted but there’s no event to flag in the webhook to indicated it. Additionally, when looking in the documentation, we can pass the field deleted on query for groups, but it doesn’t return the group deleted.

The query test:

{
boards(ids: ) {
groups{
deleted
title
}
}
}
